description: Read and write messages on a Vestaboard split-flap display, with transition control and VBML text formatting.

tools.name: message_get
tools.description: Read the message currently displayed on the board. The layout is a JSON-encoded 2D array of character codes whose dimensions depend on the board type.

tools.name: message_send
tools.description: Send a new message to the board. Provide --text (plain text / VBML) or --characters (a JSON 2D array of character codes). Rate limited to 1 message per 15 seconds. Optional: text, characters, forced.

tools.name: transition_get
tools.description: Get the current transition style and speed.

tools.name: transition_set
tools.description: Set the transition style and speed. Both fields are required. Required: transition, transitionSpeed.

params.name: transition
params.description: Transition style: classic, wave, drift, or curtain.

tools.name: vbml_format
tools.description: Convert a text string into a 2D array of Vestaboard character codes. Required: message. (public)

params.name: message
params.description: The text string to format into character codes.
